title: stevia urticifolia
intro: Stevia urticifolia, also known as buffalo grass or prairie sweet, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Stevia urticifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Stevia urticifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications, such as salves and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
